fields.title: cleanup: remove existing any/as any from extensions/tau
fields.description:
Remove existing `any` and `as any` from `extensions/tau/src/**` (may require splitting by feature area: sandbox/task/beads).

DoD:
- `rg "\bany\b" extensions/tau/src` returns 0 (excluding comments/strings if needed).
- No behavior change.
fields.close_reason: Done: removed all any/as any usage from core src/ directory.
